0.text: Peripheral subpleural patchy ground-glass opacities in the apical regions of the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Peripheral subpleural patchy ground-glass opacities in the anterior left upper lobe

2.text: Peripheral subpleural patchy ground-glass opacities in the right lower lobe, more prominent on the right

3.text: Linear atelectatic changes extending from the superior to the subpleural area in the lower lobe of the left lung

4.text: Calcific nodules measuring up to 4 mm in the lower lobe of the left lung
